category_sources: source_facts.description says high-performance column-oriented distributed data store; official homepage https://druid.apache.org/ describes Apache Druid as a real-time analytics database.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and branding at https://druid.apache.org/ use Apache Druid.
docs_sources: Official Apache Druid site links Docs and provides the /docs/latest/ documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Apache Druid homepage links GitHub, and the official repository is https://github.com/apache/druid.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe column-oriented distributed storage, OLAP-style analytics, streaming/batch ingestion, and distributed scale.
